CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-22-2024 Continued To Jan-14-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion To Enforce Settlement (C.C.P. Section 664.6)
Off Calendar Oct-17-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC's Motion To Enforce Settlement (C.C.P. Section 664.6).

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion to enforce settlement" is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
